title: CapTraceBench Task-Skill Index
description: Unified task-level metadata and skill index for CapTraceBench, combining domain assignment, taxonomy, difficulty levels, task lists, and task-local skills directories into a single JSON file.
skill_detection_rule: A skill is counted when it is a direct child directory under data/tasks/{task_name}/environment/skills and contains a SKILL.md file. Other top-level files or directories are recorded as auxiliary_entries.

1.name: Level 1 - Entry
1.description: Entry-level professional tasks requiring domain knowledge but with straightforward algorithms or formulas

2.name: Level 2 - Intermediate
2.description: Intermediate professional tasks requiring multi-step reasoning, domain-specific algorithms, or component integration

3.name: Level 3 - Advanced
3.description: Advanced expert-level tasks requiring deep domain expertise, complex algorithmic pipelines, or specialized systems knowledge

levels_data.title: CapTraceBench Task Difficulty Classification
levels_data.description: Hierarchical classification of 75 professional domain tasks into 3 difficulty levels based on algorithm complexity, skill depth, domain expertise, integration complexity, and implementation difficulty.

1.name: Level 1 - Entry
1.description: Entry-level professional tasks requiring domain knowledge but with straightforward algorithms or formulas

2.name: Level 2 - Intermediate
2.description: Intermediate professional tasks requiring multi-step reasoning, domain-specific algorithms, or component integration

3.name: Level 3 - Advanced
3.description: Advanced expert-level tasks requiring deep domain expertise, complex algorithmic pipelines, or specialized systems knowledge

taxonomy_data.title: CapTraceBench Task Taxonomy
taxonomy_data.description: Hierarchical taxonomy of 75 professional domain tasks organized by domain and task family (7 domains, 23 families)
